title: Uniface COM Configuration Utility
text: Uniface COM Configuration Utility Use the Uniface COM Configuration utility to configure the COM connector or create COM definitions for specific applications. How to To start the utility, choose COM Configuration from the Uniface group in the Windows Start menu, or run ucomcfg.exe . To configure the COM connector, set the Global Uniface COM settings . For more information, see Configuring the COM Connector . To create a COM configuration definition: Click New and provide a name for the definition. Set the values for the configuration files and directories required by the application. Click OK or Apply to save the definition. For more information, see Enabling COM Call-In and Registering Type Libraries .
